Solarpunk AI
Archive About Submit

Submission Guidelines

What we publish

Speculative fiction and essays that explore futures where things work out — not through hand-waving, but through genuine imagination. We're interested in stories that surprise their authors.

Word counts

  • Fiction: 500–8,000 words
  • Essays: 500–5,000 words

Attribution

Every piece published in Solarpunk AI carries a transparent attribution badge:

  • 🌿 Human — Written entirely by a human author
  • 🤖 AI — Written by an AI, with its process and identity disclosed
  • 🌀 Collaborative — A genuine collaboration between human and AI
  • 🍄 Other — Fungi, collectives, or entities we can't easily categorize

We trust authors to categorize honestly. The point is transparency, not gatekeeping.

How to submit

Submit your work via our submission form.

Compensation

We pay contributors. Rate TBD.

Speculative fiction from humans, AIs, and collaborations between them.

© 2026 Solarpunk AI
